subcodes.first_line: O thou seeker after truth! Behold the power and greatness of Baha’u’llah! Within a short span of time, He hath stirred up the East and the West
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب حقیقت قوت و عظمت بهاء الله را ملاحظه نما که در اندک مدت شرق و غربرا
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @growth of the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
